name: Cinnamon Swirl Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in the bread machine pan.
2. Start the bread machine and set a kitchen timer for 30 minutes.
3. Cover a bread board with plastic wrap and dust with flour.
4. When the time is up, remove the dough from the container with your hands, leaving the bread pan in place in the machine.
5. Place the dough on the floured board.
6. Dust the top of the dough and your hands with flour.
7. Pat the dough into a 6" x 10" rectangle.
8. Combine 2 teaspoons cinnamon and 1 teaspoon sugar.
9. Spoon the mixture in three long rows down the dough.
10. Roll the dough into a fat cylinder, left to right, then fold it in half, twisting the ends together.
11. Place the dough, ends down, back in the bread machine, close the lid, and continue the cycle.
Comments:
- The author used buttermilk powder mixed with water instead of actual buttermilk, as the milk was already warm from using lukewarm water.
- Regular margarine was used, and a bit more yeast was added for better rise in the machine.
- The 30-minute duration is a guide; ensure the dough has finished kneading and started its first rise before removing it.
- If your machine includes a preheat or rest phase at the start of the cycle, the timer does not begin until after that phase.
- Work quickly to avoid heat loss from the machine while applying flour to hands and plastic wrap. The dough is very sticky; additional flour may be necessary.
